# 喜歡的 UI 就要親手做出來

> Canonical site: https://build.intersection.tw/
> Language: Traditional Chinese (zh-TW)
> Type: Personal technical blog focused on UI engineering, frontend development, Astro, React, translations, and implementation notes.

This site publishes hands-on frontend engineering articles and selected technical translations. The most current translation on the site is the favicon article below; it is maintained as a living translation of a living original article.

## Priority Pages

- Home: https://build.intersection.tw/
- How to Favicon in 2026: Three files that fit most needs (translation): https://build.intersection.tw/how-to-favicon

## Published Posts

- Let Airtable API results follow the same order as the grid view: https://build.intersection.tw/airtable-grid-view
- Splitbee analytics introduction: https://build.intersection.tw/analytics-tool-splitbee
- Chakra UI with React Hook Form notes: https://build.intersection.tw/chakra-ui-with-react-hook-form
- Stitches introduction: https://build.intersection.tw/css-in-js-stitches
- How to favicon in 2026 (translation): https://build.intersection.tw/how-to-favicon
- Solving MDX component TypeScript typing issues: https://build.intersection.tw/mdx-typescript
- i18next implementation notes: https://build.intersection.tw/react-i18next
- First use of Remix with mdx-bundler: https://build.intersection.tw/remix-with-mdx-bundler
- Building a fast static site with Astro: https://build.intersection.tw/using-astro
- Supabase usage notes: https://build.intersection.tw/using-supabase
- Zed editor introduction: https://build.intersection.tw/zed-editor

## Pages

- Technical translations: https://build.intersection.tw/translations
- UI translations: https://build.intersection.tw/ui-translations
